name: /pr-corpus-update skips a source whose remaining daily token budget would be exceeded by the planned fetch
command: mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro/pr-corpus && printf '{"cfpb-consumerfinance":{"used_today":99500}}\n' > .claude-tdd-pro/pr-corpus/budget.json && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/pr-corpus-update.sh" --source cfpb-consumerfinance --estimated-tokens 5000 --budget .claude-tdd-pro/pr-corpus/budget.json --dry-run 2>out.txt && grep -q 'skipped=token-budget' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
